UPDATE MailboxBase
				SET NoEmailCount=@noEmailCount,
				ProcessEmailReceivedAfter=@processEmailReceivedAfter,
				LastMessageId=@lastMessageId
				WHERE MailboxId=@mailboxId

UPDATE MailboxTrackingFolderBase with (UPDLOCK)
												SET FolderOnboardingStatus = 1
												where MailboxId = @mailboxId AND ModifiedOn <= @dateTimeNow

SELECT MailboxTrackingFolderId, 
													MailboxId,
													ExchangeFolderId,
													ExchangeFolderName,
													RegardingObjectId,
													RegardingObjectTypeCode,
													RegardingObjectIdName,
													FolderOnboardingStatus
											FROM MailboxTrackingFolderBase with (READPAST, READCOMMITTEDLOCK) 
											where MailboxId = @mailboxId AND ModifiedOn <= @dateTimeNow

SELECT EmailAddress 
					FROM MailboxBase
					WHERE 
						(
							IncomingEmailDeliveryMethod = @forwardMailbox
						)AND
						(
							StateCode = @activeStateCode
						)AND
						(
							EmailAddress is NOT NULL
						)AND
						(
							(
								EmailRouterAccessApproval=@approvedState
							) OR 
							(
								(
									RegardingObjectTypeCode=@userType And @OrgApprovalRequiredForUser = 0
								)
							)OR
							(
								(
									RegardingOb

UPDATE ActivityPointerBase
				SET DeliveryAttempts = @deliveryAttempts, PostponeActivityProcessingUntil = @dateTimeNow
				WHERE ActivityId = @activityId

UPDATE ActivityPointerBase
						SET PostponeActivityProcessingUntil = @dateTimeNow, SentOn = @sentOn
						WHERE ActivityId = @activityId

PostponeTestEmailConfigurationUntil = 
					CASE WHEN PostponeTestEmailConfigurationUntil <= @dequeuedPostponeTestAccessUntil 
					THEN @postponeTestAccessUntil ELSE PostponeTestEmailConfigurationUntil END,

TestEmailConfigurationScheduled = 
					CASE WHEN PostponeTestEmailConfigurationUntil <= @dequeuedPostponeTestAccessUntil AND 
						((OutgoingEmailStatus <> @failedStatus AND @status <> @failedStatus) OR 
							TestEmailConfigurationRetryCount <= 1) 
					THEN 0 ELSE TestEmailConfigurationScheduled END,

TestEmailConfigurationRetryCount = 
					CASE WHEN PostponeTestEmailConfigurationUntil > @dequeuedPostponeTestAccessUntil THEN TestEmailConfigurationRetryCount
						ELSE CASE WHEN ((OutgoingEmailStatus <> @failedStatus AND @status <> @failedStatus) OR 
							TestEmailConfigurationRetryCount <= 1) 
					THEN 0 ELSE TestEmailConfigurationRetryCount - 1 END END,

MailboxProcessingContext = 
						CASE WHEN (OutgoingEmailStatus <> @failedStatus AND @status <> @failedStatus) OR 
							TestEmailConfigurationRetryCount <= 1 
					THEN @normalContext ELSE MailboxProcessingContext END,

TransientFailureCount = CASE 
						WHEN TransientFailureCount & @transientErrorCountMask = @maxTransientFailureCount OR EnabledForIncomingEmail = 0
